case_title: MATTHEW TEEL et al VS. CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, DBA SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: OTHER NON EXEMPT COMPLAINTS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TEEL, MATTHEW TEEL, ALLYSON TEEL, SHARON TEEL, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, DBA SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL TRANSPORTATION AGENCY DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-16-2014 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-14-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-23-2014
NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-26-2014 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUL-16-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-09-2014 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST ALLYSON TEEL FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: DEC-09-2014, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE DEC-26-2014. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST MICHAEL TEEL FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: DEC-09-2014, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE DEC-26-2014. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-21-2014 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST ALLYSON TEEL FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: OCT-21-2014, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-07-2014. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING MAR-10-2015 AT 10:30 AM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. GOVERNMENT CODE 68608 (B) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-12-2015 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance nor objection. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter be dismissed pursuant to Gov. Code 68608 (b). The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk EBura; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-10-2014 Continued To Mar-10-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiffs are sanctioned $400.00 each for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is reset to MAR-10-2015 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE CYNTHIA M. LEE; Clerk KCox; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-23-2014 Continued To Dec-09-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiffs are sanctioned $400.00 each for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to DEC-09-2014 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK KCox; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-27-2014 Continued To Oct-21-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff Pro Per Matthew Teel, Allyson Teel, Sharon Teel and Michale Teel are sanctioned $400.00 each for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is reset to Oct-21-2014 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE CYNTHIA M. LEE; Clerk JLee. proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-30-2014 Set For Order To Show Cause On Aug-26-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
